summary: Iteration 100: All features tested and working - Quick Score Boost widget, Auto-populate Pet Parent/Pet Profile dropdowns in Command Center and Service Desk, Pet Parent Directory tab
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features verified working: 1) Quick Score Boost widget shows 3 questions with point values on Member Dashboard (visible when score < 75%), 2) Auto-populate Pet Parent dropdown in Command Center with 26 options, 3) Auto-populate Pet Profile dropdown in Command Center, 4) Selecting pet parent auto-fills name/email/phone fields, 5) Service Desk page accessible at /admin/service-desk with same auto-populate functionality, 6) Pet Parent Directory tab shows 25 members with search/filter capabilities

quick_score_boost.details: Widget shows 3 high-impact questions (Health Conditions +8pts, Energy Level +6pts, Vet Comfort Level +5pts) with current score 18% and potential boost +19%

auto_populate_pet_parent.details: Dropdown shows 26 pet parents with name and email, selecting auto-fills Member Name and Email fields

auto_populate_pet_profile.details: Dropdown shows pet profiles for selection

service_desk_access.details: Accessible at /admin/service-desk with separate login, has same auto-populate dropdowns

member_directory.details: Pet Parent Directory tab shows 25 members with search, filters (Status, Sources, Tiers, Cities), and member details

api_tests_passed: GET /api/pet-score/{pet_id}/quick-questions - Returns 3 questions with point values
GET /api/admin/members/directory - Returns 25 pet parents for dropdown
GET /api/admin/pets - Returns pet profiles for dropdown
